data.current_description: Search for group resources, used for bulk data access.
data.summary_suggestion: Search for Group resources for bulk data operations
data.description_suggestion: Searches for FHIR Group resources used to organize patients for bulk data access operations. Supports standard FHIR search parameters to filter groups by identifier, name, or other attributes. Returns a Bundle containing matching Group resources. Requires appropriate OAuth 2.0 scopes for bulk data access. Useful for identifying patient cohorts for population health queries or bulk export operations.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't convey the bulk data context. Description lacks critical details about search parameters, return format (Bundle), authentication requirements, and use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose in bulk data workflows, explains what parameters can be used, specifies the Bundle response format consistent with API context, mentions OAuth requirements, and provides concrete use cases to help AI agents determine when to invoke this operation.
